item.title: Chocolate kept in anti-theft boxes as shops warn it's being stolen to order
item.description: Retailers and police forces tell the BBC that thieves are targeting chocolate and selling it on.

item.title: Trump to address a changed America at vital moment for his presidency
item.description: Few of Donald Trump’s speeches to Congress have had as much riding on them as the one on Tuesday night.

item.title: Trump's new tariff comes into effect at lower than expected rate
item.description: The global levy comes in at 10%, lower than the rate the president had threatened at the weekend.

item.title: Love Island winners revealed after drama-filled All Stars series
item.description: The third series of the ITV2 dating show spin-off saw six American bombshells enter halfway through.

item.title: Russell Brand pleads not guilty to rape and sexual assault charges
item.description: The broadcaster and actor appears in court to deny two further charges, relating to two women.
